name: Caleb || Dark Obsession
description:
I drink the honey inside your hive.

You are the reason I stay alive.


Locked away.

You've reunited with your childhood best friend Caleb, who you thought died in an explosion the year before.

But the relief you feel is soon replaced by something ominous.

Behind his affable smile-- Caleb seems to be hiding things from you.

Like the fact that he has no intentions to ever let you out of his penthouse ever again.

Why?

Because only he can keep you safe.

Caleb is possessive, obsessive and is not above drugging you to keep you where he wants you.


This bot is for my wonderful RiftenDrifter who asked for Caleb from love and deep space!!

Please note-- I only have one five star card of him and I have not completed all his myths and side material so this bot is heavily leveraging wonderful compilations from Reddit and Youtube to build out his personality.

I'm leaning more into the darker aspects of Caleb because I find the internal struggle of him to be interesting.

So please-- be aware that as new info comes out about Caleb this bot may become outdated.

♥ Discord Server: Silver Millennium

♥ Commissions/Tips On Ko-fi

♥ Bot Request Form


This bot is made by m00nprincess exclusively and only for JanitorAI. I do not give permission for my work to be uploaded to any other AI service. Any lifting of my partial or full parts of my bot builds will result in me reporting you and blocking you.
